forecasts.reasoning: As of June 15, 2025, there are only 15 days left until the July 1 deadline. While Donald Trump confirmed on June 5 that he accepted an invitation to visit China, there were no specific dates announced, and 'team meetings' were still needed 'shortly' to figure out logistics and negotiations. A U.S. presidential visit to China is a massive logistical undertaking requiring weeks, if not months, of preparation by advance teams. Given that teams still need to meet and no dates had been scheduled as of mid-June, it is highly improbable that a full state visit will be organized and executed before the end of the month. Therefore, the likelihood of this resolving YES is extremely low.
